test_focus: All 8 lexical fields dispatch correct minigame scripts

checks.desc: detect_field_from_verb() returns correct field for each of 8 fields
checks.detail: NOTE: MiniGameRegistry.detect_field() is NOT called in production. Production uses MerlinEffectEngine.detect_field_from_verb(verb) which iterates MerlinConstants.ACTION_VERBS. Tested all 8 fields via ACTION_VERBS dict. Fallback = ACTION_VERB_FALLBACK_FIELD = 'esprit'. All match.

checks.desc: create_minigame(field) returns non-null MiniGameBase for all 8 fields
checks.detail: GAMES dict has all 8 fields. Match statement covers all game IDs including mg_trace_cerf (observation tier-3). All mg_ scripts exist under scripts/minigames/. All extend MiniGameBase. Fallback to mg_pile_ou_face if game == null.

checks.desc: Returned script class matches expected field
checks.detail: GAMES maps each field to semantically-correct minigames (chance→pile_ou_face/roue_fortune, bluff→joute_verbale/bluff_druide/negociation, etc.). All scripts verified to extend MiniGameBase.

checks.desc: neutre field falls back to esprit (MG-FIX-NEUTRE-FALLBACK)
checks.detail: FIELD_MINIGAMES['neutre'] = ['esprit']. select_minigame('neutre') returns 'esprit'. MerlinMiniGameSystem.run('esprit', diff) executes _play_esprit(). MiniGameRegistry.create_minigame('esprit') returns valid esprit minigame. Full chain works.

checks.desc: select_minigame() fallback value is a valid field name
checks.detail: select_minigame() returns 'apaisement' (a GAME name, not a FIELD name) when FIELD_MINIGAMES.get(field, []) is empty. 'apaisement' is not in MerlinMiniGameSystem.VALID_FIELDS, causing _play_generic() fallback in run(). Should return MerlinConstants.ACTION_VERB_FALLBACK_FIELD = 'esprit'. FIXED in this cycle.

checks.desc: pick_minigame_for_field() fallback aligned with field names
checks.detail: pick_minigame_for_field() also returns 'apaisement' for unknown fields (test-only function). test_effect_engine.gd:1424 expects 'apaisement' — test expectation is wrong. Both function and test need alignment to 'esprit'. FIXED in this cycle.

bugs_found.description: select_minigame() and pick_minigame_for_field() return 'apaisement' (game name) as fallback instead of 'esprit' (field name). MerlinMiniGameSystem.run('apaisement') falls to _play_generic() using wrong scoring algorithm.
bugs_found.fix_description: Changed 'apaisement' → MerlinConstants.ACTION_VERB_FALLBACK_FIELD ('esprit') in both functions. Updated test expectation.

summary.overall: PARTIAL_PASS — neutre→esprit chain works, all 8 fields covered, fallback fixed in cycle
